Document:
# The Cosmic Cult
[color=#999999][italic]"A revelation beyond compare. An end to cyclic, sisyphean suffering."[/italic][/color]
[color=#999999][italic]"A gentle curtain call."[/italic][/color]
Otherworldly knowledge floods your mind! Welcome to the [color=#4cabb3]Cosmic Cult[/color], a team antagonist that has set its sights on the end of all things.
Use [color=#4cabb3]:a[/color] to communicate with fellow cultists through the [color=#4cabb3]Astral Murmur[/color].
## Objectives - [color=#4cabb3][bold]Siphon Entropy[/bold][/color] - Collectively siphon a certain amount of Entropy from the crew. The more entropy you siphon, the more you can empower the Monument! - [color=#4cabb3][bold]Attain Power[/bold][/color] - The more you gather entropy, the more power the cult gains access to, and the stronger are it's effects on the station. - [color=#4cabb3][bold]Usher In The End[/bold][/color] - Once the cult is at full power, summon The Monument and complete the final ritual to beckon the Unknown and destroy the station.
Progress towards objectives is shared by the entire cult.
## Entropy
All cultists start with two abilities, or [color=#4cabb3][bold]Influences[/bold][/color] - one of which is [italic][color=#4cabb3]Siphon Entropy[/color][/italic]. This is your bread and butter as a cosmic cultist, and you'll want to use it as often as possible.
Using Siphon Entropy on an unsuspecting crewmember will stealthily award you [color=#4cabb3]Entropy[/color].
You can also siphon from crewmembers in critical condition, which will significantly increase the amount of entropy gathered, especially from high-value targets. However, doing so would also kill the target, so make sure to leave no witnesses.
The second Influence, [italic][color=#4cabb3]Attune Influence[/color][/italic] is just as important. Using it will allow you to see the cult's progress, as well as spend gathered entropy to unlock more [color=#4cabb3][bold]Influences[/bold][/color].
[textlink="For more on Influences, click here." link="CosmicCultInfluences"]
When the cult grows stronger, they gain the ability to make [color=#4cabb3]Vacuous Spires[/color]. These can be made by transmuting a Gas Canister using [color=#4cabb3]Corrupt Matter[/color].
When anchored in place, a vacuous spire rapidly devours the surrounding atmosphere! This process causes [color=#4cabb3]Motes of Entropy[/color] to condense from a spire's surface, acting as a powerful lategame source of entropy.
## Malign Rifts
As your cult progresses, [color=#4cabb3]Malign Rifts[/color] will begin to spawn throughout the surrounding environment. These rifts in realspace bleed unstable astral power, and should be located as soon as possible!
Cultists may stealthily [color=#4cabb3]absorb[/color] a Malign Rift by interacting with it.
Successful absorbtion of a Malign Rift will [bold]permanently[/bold] empower the cultist doing so, increasing the strength of all the [color=#4cabb3]Influences[/color] they possess, and doubling the [color=#4cabb3]Entropy[/color] they gain from siphoning crewmembers. Empowered cultists also no longer need to breathe, eat, or drink, and are immune to the vaccuum of space.
Empowered cultists also gain the [color=#4cabb3]Null Fragmentation[/color] influence, which can be used to convert a Cyborg into an [color=#4cabb3]Entropic Colossus[/color], or to corrupt the station AI's laws.
Malign Rifts can be purged by interacting with them using a bible.
[color=#4cabb3]Malign Fracture[/color] is a more powerful version of a Malign Rift. It is harder to purge, easier to absorb, and corrupts it's environment at a much faster rate.
Standing near a fracture is dangerous! Unless you are protected by divine power, or are a part of the cosmic cult, you should keep your distance from any Fractures, as coming too close might have negative effects.
## Vacuous Chantries
While empowered, cultists can choose to use [color=#4cabb3]Null Fragmentation[/color] on a [bold]Cyborg[/bold]. Doing so will trap them inside a [color=#4cabb3]Vacuous Chantry[/color]! This will trigger a stationwide alert, and begin the process of transfiguring the unfortunate victim into an [color=#4cabb3]Entropic Colossus[/color].
Be prepared to defend the chantry - or use it as a distraction to draw the crew's attention! The crew must use weapons to destroy the chantry in order to free the trapped Cyborg within.
If successfully unleashed, an Entropic Colossus will be a force to be reckoned with.
[textlink="For more on Entropic Colossi, click here." link="CosmicColossus"]
## Malign Law
While empowered, one of the ways cultists can choose to expend their empowerment is by using [color=#4cabb3]Null Fragmentation[/color] on the [bold]AI Upload Console[/bold]. Provided there is a Station AI active, this will forcibly overwrite their laws with a corrupt set of guidelines, aligning them with the Cosmic Cult, in addition to granting them access to the Astral Murmur channel.
If a different lawboard was installed, this process will forcibly eject the previous lawboard from the AI Upload Console, regardless of wether or not the console was locked. Be warned; the crew will still be able to restore the Station AI's functionality by installing a safe, crew-aligned lawboard.
